items.title: Flowerscapes: Photographing Flowers From a Bug’s Eye Perspective
items.summary: I have wondered for many years what you would see if you were a tiny ant looking up when walking through a flower field, or a ladybug that has just landed on a flower stem. [Read More]

items.title: 31 Otherworldly New Deep-Sea Species Photographed with Cutting-Edge Camera Technology
items.summary: Scientists discovered and photographed 31 new deep-sea species -- typically too delicate to document -- in a matter of days using cutting-edge camera technology. [Read More]

items.title: Painter David Hockney, Who Made the Everyday Otherworldly, Dies at 88
items.summary: His work over a prolific six decades ranged from psychologically precise portraits to luminous depictions of California pool sides.
